title: Identify relevant triangles and angles
text: Draw a diagram. Identify the two right triangles formed by each guy-wire, the pole, and the ground. Let $$\theta_R$$ be the angle wire R makes with the ground, and $$\theta_S$$ be the angle wire S makes with the ground.

title: Identify opposite and adjacent sides for wire R
text: For the angle $$\theta_R$$ that wire R makes with the ground, what are the lengths of the opposite and adjacent sides?

title: Relate angles to tangent
text: Use the tangent function to find expressions for $$tan\left(\theta\right) _R$$ and $$tan\left(\theta\right) _S$$.

title: Calculate $$tan\left(\theta\right) _R$$ and $$tan\left(\theta\right) _S$$
text: What are the values of $$tan\left(\theta\right) _R$$ and $$tan\left(\theta\right) _S$$?

title: Apply the tangent difference formula
text: The angle \alpha between the wires is the difference between the angles each wire makes with the ground. Use the tangent difference identity: tan(θ_R - θ_S) $$=$$ (tan(θ)_R - tan(θ)_S)/(1 + $$tan\left(\theta\right) _R$$ tan(θ)_S).

title: Calculate tan(\alpha)
text: Substitute the tangent values into the formula tan(\alpha) $$=$$ (tan(θ)_R - tan(θ)_S)/(1 + $$tan\left(\theta\right) _R$$ tan(θ)_S) and simplify.
